reviews.comment:
Buena atención, hay cajero automático móvil.
Baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Good service, there's a mobile ATM.
Clean bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdmF6OXVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños son un desastre, si no saliste en 2 minutos vomitas adentro. Un asco, falta total de higiene. Y es el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disaster; if you don't get out within two minutes, you'll throw up inside. Disgusting, a total lack of hygiene. And it's the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcGJUdU93EAE

reviews.comment:
Bien, como toda estación YPF. Le faltarían lugares para sentarse en el área de árboles que dan muy buena sombra en pleno verano. Pero lo demás impecable. No cargamos combustible para opinar sobre el servicio.

Los baños muy limpios. El bar tiene lo necesario. No es FULL.

(Translated by Google)
Good, like any YPF station. It could use more seating in the shaded area, which is very nice in the middle of summer. But otherwise, it was impeccable. We didn't fill up with fuel, so we can't comment on the service.

The restrooms were very clean. The bar has the essentials. It's not a full-service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteGRHQVVREAE

reviews.comment:
Gran cordialidad, llegué fuera de temporada y después de dos años de pandemia pero resolvieron todo...
Nunca te olvides del ACA y llevá tú carnet de asociado!!

(Translated by Google)
Great hospitality. I arrived out of season and after two years of the pandemic, but they sorted everything out... Never forget the ACA and bring your membership card!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMmJlb0lnEAE

reviews.comment:
La caferetia esta buena le falta mas productos de variedad

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria is good, it just needs more variety in its products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbWJLUVlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien y tienen todos los medios de pago, lo MALO es que siempre hay fila porque el sistema de cobro y facturacion es burocratico y obliga a cada playero a PERDER mucho tiempo con cada cliente. Yo le doy un 7 de 10.

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service and offer all payment methods. The bad thing is that there's always a line because the billing and collection system is bureaucratic and forces each beach attendant to waste a lot of time with each customer. I give it a 7 out of 10.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaWNhQkZBEAE
